title: CLA Routing Keywords
description: Tier 1 declarative file mapping problem-statement keywords to CxO personas + fallback roles. Used by /cla command Phase 2 (Domain Deep-Dive) to auto-route domain analysis to the right specialist chief. See: .archives/cla/03-architecture.md §6, .archives/cla/08-next-steps-checklist.md Sprint 1 §1.

owner.description: Owner of this file (founder by default).

last_updated.description: ISO date string of last update.

routes.description: Map of domain slug → routing config. Domain slug is the conceptual area (growth, product, code, etc).

keywords.description: Words/phrases (case-insensitive substring match) that route a problem to this domain.

cxo.description: Persona slug from knowledge/workforce-personas.yaml (e.g. cgo, cpo, cto). Must exist in registry (active OR planned).

fallback_role.description: Technical role from governance/ROLES.md to dispatch to when the bound persona is not yet active.

notes.description: Free-form notes on the routing rule.

ambiguous_fallback.description: What to do when no route matches OR multiple routes tie. Default: muse_panel (Bài #15 cross-functional decision panel).
